attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
      SDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY      DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_REVENUE_FLG         DV_REVENUE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID      TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID ,
      WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD BK_SS_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT AS GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.LINE_TYPE_CD LINE_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.SPLIT_PCT SPLIT_PCT ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_DTM GL_DTM ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_POSTED_DTM GL_POSTED_DTM ,
      WDNRTFR.RULE_START_DTM RULE_START_DTM ,
      WDNRTFR.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD FORWARD_REVERSE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.LAST_RECORD_FLG LAST_RECORD_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD DD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
      WDNRTFR.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT ,
      WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
      Coalesce(HSSOL.SERVICE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, -7777)  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.AR_TRX_KEY AR_TRX_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT ,
	  CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY = -998 THEN (CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN EV.ITEM_KEY ELSE 5863624 /*ERP_NA_PROD*/ END)  ELSE WDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY END PRODUCT_KEY,  
      WDNRTFR.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_CHARGES_FLG DV_CHARGES_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG DV_CORP_REVENUE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_MISC_FLG DV_MISC_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG DV_SERVICE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT END AS DV_COMP_US_BASE_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT END AS DV_COMP_US_COST_AMT ,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_EXTENDED_QTY END AS DV_EXTENDED_QTY ,
      WDNRTFR.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG SERVICE_CONTRACT_FLG ,
      WDRTCN.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM ,
      WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM CUSTOMER_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM ,
      WDNRTFR.SHIPPED_DT SHIPPED_DT ,
      WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY ,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT END AS DV_COMP_US_ORDER_LIST_PRC_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME INTERFACE_SOURCE_NAME ,
      WDNRTFR.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_FLG MAJOR_LINE_FLG ,
      WDNRTFR.MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY MAJOR_LINE_SALES_ORDER_LN_KEY ,
      COALESCE(WDNRTFR.DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD, 'UNKNOWN')  DD_CUST_PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CD,
      WDNRTFR.SERVICE_TYPE_CD SERVICE_TYPE_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT ,
      CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT END AS DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT ,
      WDNRTFR.GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT GL_POSTING_CONTROL_ID_INT ,
      COALESCE(WDNRTFR.DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD, 'UNKNOWN')  DD_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY ,
      WDNRTFR.SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME SALES_ORDER_TYPE_NAME ,
      WDNRTFR.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD ,
      WDNRTFR.BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
      USER EDW_CREATE_USER ,
      CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
      USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
      CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
      WDNRTFR.SALES_REP_NUM SALES_REP_NUM ,
      WDNRTFR.DV_FISCAL_DT DV_FISCAL_DT ,
      WDNRTFR.NCR_TRANSACTION_REASON_CD,
      RANDOM(1010000,1011800)*-1 RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.DEFAULT_SC_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLG,
      WDNRTFR.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
      WDNRTFR.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
      WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
      WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
      WDNRTFR.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
      WDNRTFR.DV_TRX_AMT AS DV_TRX_AMT,
      WDNRTFR.DV_FUNC_AMT AS DV_FUNC_AMT,
      -999 AS REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
      WDRTOA.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
      WDRTOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	  CASE WHEN WDRTOA.DV_PRODUCT_KEY = -998 THEN (CASE WHEN WDNRTFR.DV_SERVICE_FLG='Y' THEN EV.ITEM_KEY ELSE 5863624 /*ERP_NA_PROD*/ END)  ELSE WDRTOA.DV_PRODUCT_KEY END DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
      WDRTOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
   WDRTOA.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY,
   WDNRTFR.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT,
    -999 AS POS_TRX_ID_INT,
    -999 AS ADJSMT_RBT_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_KEY,
    CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10 AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.DV_COMP_US_NET_PURC_ADJ_AMT END,
	WDRTOA.POB_TYPE_CD,
	WDRTOA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
	WDRTOA.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
	 CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%'  THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT END,
	  CASE WHEN NATL.INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT > 10  AND NATL.ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 0.0000 ELSE WDNRTFR.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT END,
	  WDRTOA.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD, /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
      'I' AS DML_TYPE
      FROM
      $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_OM WDNRTFR
      INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_REV_OM WDRTOA
      ON (WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID=WDRTOA.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID AND
      WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = WDRTOA.BK_SS_CD)
    INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_REV_TRX_CNTRT_NUM_OM WDRTCN 
    ON ( WDRTCN.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT =WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID
   AND WDRTCN.BK_SS_CD=WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OA_SERVICE_ORDER_LINE HSSOL
   ON HSSOL.HW_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=WDRTOA.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   AND WDNRTFR.PRODUCT_KEY=HSSOL.SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY
   AND WDRTOA.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=HSSOL.HW_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY            
   AND WDRTOA.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD='NOAH'
   AND WDRTOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED'
      INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SDNRTFR
      ON (
      WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID = SDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT     
      AND WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = SDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD )
	  INNER  JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_SRVC_FIN_ACCOUNT_PID_MAP EV
  ON (EV.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE=WDNRTFR.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD)
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
  ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WDRTOA.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  
      AND NOT EXISTS
     ( SELECT 1
      FROM  $$WORKDB.W_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV W
     WHERE W.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY =  SDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY 
     )

SELECT 
 WDNRTFR_SRVCE_CONTRACT_NUM.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ,
 WDNRTFR_SRVCE_CONTRACT_NUM.BK_SS_CD BK_SS_CD ,
 WDNRTFR_SRVCE_CONTRACT_NUM.CLEANED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
 CASE WHEN WDNRTFR_SRVCE_CONTRACT_NUM.DV_SERVICE_FLG ='N' OR WDNRTFR_SRVCE_CONTRACT_NUM.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD='GL'  THEN NULL
   ELSE
   (CASE 
    WHEN CHARACTERS( WDNRTFR_SRVCE_CONTRACT_NUM.CLEANED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM) =7 THEN  CLEANED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  
   ELSE NULL 
    END )
 END SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM
 FROM 
 (
 SELECT 
 WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT ,
 WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD BK_SS_CD ,

 WHEN SUBSTRING (WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS( WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM ) -49 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'

 WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-13 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
 THEN  '' 
 ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-13 FOR 1 )
 END ||
 CASE
 WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-12 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
 THEN  '' 
 ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-12 FOR 1 )
 END ||
 CASE
 WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-11 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
 THEN  '' 
 ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-11 FOR 1 )
 END ||
 CASE
 WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-10 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
 THEN  '' 
 ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-10 FOR 1 )
 END ||
 CASE
 WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-9 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
 THEN  '' 
 ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-9 FOR 1 )
 END  ||
 CASE
 WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-8 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
 THEN  '' 
 ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-8 FOR 1 )
 END  ||
 CASE
 WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-7 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
 THEN  '' 
 ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-7 FOR 1 )
 END ||
 CASE
 WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-6 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
 THEN  '' 
 ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-6 FOR 1 )
 END ||
 CASE
 WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-5 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
 THEN  '' 
 ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-5 FOR 1 )
 END ||
 CASE
 WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-4 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
 THEN  '' 
 ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-4 FOR 1 )
 END ||
 CASE
 WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-3 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
 THEN  '' 
 ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-3 FOR 1 )
 END  ||
 CASE
 WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-2 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
 THEN  '' 
 ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-2 FOR 1 )
 END ||
 CASE
 WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-1 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
 THEN  '' 
 ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-1 FOR 1 )
 END ||
 CASE
 WHEN SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-0 FOR 1 ) NOT BETWEEN '0' AND '9'
 THEN  '' 
 ELSE SUBSTRING(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM  FROM CHARACTERS(WDNRTFR.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM )-0 FOR 1 )
 END CLEANED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM
 FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_OM WDNRTFR
 ) WDNRTFR_SRVCE_CONTRACT_NUM

  WDRT.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     ,
  WDRT.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,
  WDRT.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT      ,
  WDRT.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              ,
  WDRT.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            ,
  WDRT.LINE_TYPE_CD                  ,
  WDRT.SPLIT_PCT                     ,
  WDRT.GL_DTM                        ,
  WDRT.GL_POSTED_DTM                 ,
  WDRT.RULE_START_DTM                ,
  WDRT.FORWARD_REVERSE_CD            ,

  WDRT.CM_ORIGINAL_INVOICE_DT        ,
  WDRT.DV_COMP_US_REBATE_AMT         ,

SELECT  
   WDRT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID  ,
   WDRT.BK_SS_CD      ,
   NRT.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY   ,
   WDRT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,
   NRT.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
   NRT.PRODUCT_KEY,
   NRT.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
   NRT.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   NRT.POB_TYPE_CD,
   NRT.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
	NRT.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
	NRT.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
    FROM  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_OM WDRT
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NRT
   ON WDRT.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY=NRT.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
   ON NRT.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON(NRT.AR_TRANSACTION_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
 WHERE   NRT.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE ='OFFSET'
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT  
   WDRT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID  ,
   WDRT.BK_SS_CD      ,
   NRT.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY   ,
   WDRT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,
   NRT.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
   NATL.PRODUCT_KEY,
   NRT.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
   NRT.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   NRT.POB_TYPE_CD,
   NRT.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
	NRT.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
	NRT.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
    FROM  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_OM WDRT
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NRT
   ON WDRT.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY=NRT.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATL
   ON NRT.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY =NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON(NRT.AR_TRANSACTION_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
 WHERE   NRT.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE ='ATTRIBUTED'
 
 
  UNION ALL
 
 SELECT  
   WDRT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID  ,
   WDRT.BK_SS_CD      ,
   NRT.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY   ,
   WDRT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,
   NRT.OFFER_ATTRIB_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
   NATL.PRODUCT_KEY,
   NRT.ATTRIB_CD AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
   NRT.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
   NRT.POB_TYPE_CD,
   'N' NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
	'N' RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
	CAST ('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR (50)) AS BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
    FROM  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_OM WDRT
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE NRT
   ON WDRT.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY=NRT.NEW_REV_STD_DISTRI_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATL
   ON NRT.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY =NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON(NRT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
 WHERE   NRT.ATTRIB_CD  IN ('BIB','BIB OFFSET') 

UNION ALL
SELECT  
    WDRT.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID  ,
    WDRT.BK_SS_CD      ,
    NRT.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY   ,
    WDRT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,
    NRT.OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
    NRT.PRODUCT_KEY,
    NRT.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
    NRT.PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
    NRT.POB_TYPE_CD,
	NRT.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
	NRT.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
	NRT.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
     FROM  $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_OM WDRT
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE NRT
    ON WDRT.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY=NRT.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
    ON NRT.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
    INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
    ON(NRT.AR_TRANSACTION_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  WHERE   NRT.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE ='STANDALONE'

SELECT 
   RANK() OVER(ORDER BY WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID, WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD) + SMDNRTFRKEY.MAX_VAL DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY  ,
   WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID  ,
   WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD ,
   USER ,
   CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)              
   FROM 
   (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMDNRTFR.DRVD_NCR_REVENUE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SMDNRTFR ) SMDNRTFRKEY,   
   $$STGDB.WI_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV_OM WDNRTFR
   WHERE 
   NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV SDNRTFR   
     WHERE WDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD = SDNRTFR.BK_SS_CD
     AND WDNRTFR.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID  = SDNRTFR.BK_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT )
